originalTitle: Here are our favorite last-minute deals from REI’s giant Anniversary Sale
summary: REI’s annual Anniversary Sale — the retailer’s biggest of the year — is still going strong, letting you save on all kinds of outdoor essentials. If you’ve got a camping trip coming up, now is a good time to stock up on the basics, whether it be a tent, sleeping pad, or stove. If your […]
content: REI’s annual Anniversary Sale — the retailer’s biggest of the year — is still going strong, letting you save on all kinds of outdoor essentials. If you’ve got a camping trip coming up, now is a good time to stock up on the basics, whether it be a tent, sleeping pad, or stove. If your summer plans involve hiking or heading into the backcountry, there are also savings to be had on everything from Garmin watches to water filters, some of which are also discounted at retailers like Amazon. The sale runs through the end of today, May 25th, and to save you time scrolling, we’ve rounded up the best deals you can still grab below. Additionally, as in previous years, REI members get 20 percent off one full-price item or one REI Outlet item with code ANNIV26, giving those who pay for a lifetime membership ($30) even more ways to save through the end of Memorial Day. Featured Products Half Dome 2 Tent (with footprint) BioLite Site Lights REI Siesta Hooded 20 Sleeping Bag Black Diamond Spot 400 Headlamp LifeStraw Peak Series Straw Coleman Cascade Classic Camp Stove Exped MegaMat Duo Garmin Fenix 8 Kelty Low Loveseat --- In this article --- Smartwatches and fitness trackers [Product: Garmin Fenix 8 | https://www.amazon.com/Garmin-f%25C4%2593nix%25C2%25AE-Multisport-Long-Lasting-Built/dp/B0DC6ZD321?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2Ff-nix-8-51-mm-AMOLED-Slate-Gray-with-Black-Silicone-Band%2F11439909946, https://rei.pxf.io/c/482924/1448521/17195?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rei.com%2Fproduct%2F245469%2Fgarmin-fenix-8-amoled-sapphire] [Product: Amazfit Active 2 | https://www.amazon.com/Amazfit-Fitness-Tracker-Resistant-Silicone/dp/B0DT3YNMBX/?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Famazfit-active-2-smartwatch-44mm-silicone-black-2025%2FJ3R84J7HF8%2Fsku%2F6631720, https://rei.pxf.io/c/482924/1448521/17195?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rei.com%2Fproduct%2FC05683%2Famazfit-active-2-round] * Garmin’s Venu 4 is geared toward the average athlete, and it’s on sale at REI, Amazon, and Best Buy in both size configurations for $499.99 ($50 off), matching its best price to date. The wearable offers many of the same health and fitness tracking features as its predecessor, the Venu 3S, including abnormal heart rate alerts, detailed sleep insights, audio-guided meditation sessions, and a wheelchair mode. It introduces new wellness features, though, including the ability to track caffeine and alcohol intake, as well as Garmin Coach, so you can tailor workouts based on your fitness history, sleep quality, and recovery. * REI, Amazon, and Best Buy are also selling the Garmin Lily 2 Active for $249.99 ($50 off), which is its lowest price to date. The stylish smartwatch is a great budget-friendly Garmin, especially for people with smaller wrists. Like the standard Lily 2, it offers basic fitness tracking, notifications, and up to five days of battery life; however, the so-called “Active” model adds a physical button, built-in GPS, and support for more sports tracking. Read our Lily 2 review. * If you want more accurate heart rate tracking than most smartwatches offer, Polar’s H10 is on sale at REI and Amazon for $94.49 ($10 off), which is one of its better prices in recent months. Unlike wrist-based trackers, the chest strap records your heart rate directly from your chest for more precise readings during workouts. The lightweight sensor also pairs with a wide range of fitness apps, smartwatches, gym equipment, and other devices via Bluetooth, and it’s water-resistant enough for swimming. Communication and safety gear [Product: Garmin inReach Mini 2 | https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B09PSKG7C3/?tag=theverge02-20, https://rei.pxf.io/c/482924/1448521/17195?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rei.com%2Fproduct%2F208257%2Fgarmin-inreach-mini-2, https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.garmin.com/en-US/p/765374] [Product: Garmin InReach Mini 3 Plus | https://www.amazon.com/Garmin-Satellite-Communicator-Touchscreen-Messaging/dp/B0G4RST8LV?tag=theverge02-20, https://rei.pxf.io/c/482924/1448521/17195?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rei.com%2Fproduct%2FC06373%2Fgarmin-inreach-mini-3-plus, https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.garmin.com/en-US/p/1756582/] * Garmin’s base InReach Mini 3 is available from REI, Amazon, and Garmin for $399.99 ($100 off), its best price to date. Like the last-gen Mini 2, the rugged, palm-sized satellite communicator lets you send texts, share your location, check the weather, and trigger SOS alerts when you’re off the grid, all while offering battery life that can outlast your average smartphone. Unlike its predecessor, though, it features a color touchscreen, which makes it’s much easier to scroll through menus and bang out messages. * Garmin’s InReach Messenger Plus is also on sale at REI, Amazon, and direct from Garmin for $299.99 ($100 off), its lowest prices to date. The subscription-based Plus model provides satellite connectivity and access to emergency services like the aforementioned InReach Mini 3, except it can also send photos and audio clips in addition to standard text messages. * The Chapter MIPS Bike Helmet is on sale starting at around $112 ($41 off) at Amazon and REI, which nearly matches its best price to date. The lightweight helmet features a hidden PopLock for securing it with a U-lock or chain. It also features a sleek visor and a Micro-USB taillight with 30 lumens of brightness, one that will automatically turn on when magnetically attached to the helmet. * Garmin’s Varia RTL515 Radar Taillight is on sale at REI and Amazon for $149.99 ($50 off), nearly matching its lowest price to date. The headlight combines a bright LED light with a rearview radar that, when paired with a compatible device, warns you of cars approaching from behind from up to 153 yards away. Portable Bluetooth speakers [Product: JBL Charge 6 | https://www.amazon.com/JBL-Charge
chineseTitle: 以下是 REI 大型周年纪念促销中我们最喜欢的最后一刻优惠
chineseSummary: REI 的年度周年纪念促销活动（该零售商今年最大的促销活动）仍然火爆，让您可以节省各种户外必需品。如果您即将进行露营旅行，现在是储备基本必需品的好时机，无论是帐篷、睡垫还是炉灶。如果你的[…]
chineseContent: REI 的年度周年纪念促销活动（该零售商今年最大的促销活动）仍然火爆，让您可以节省各种户外必需品。如果您即将进行露营旅行，现在是储备基本必需品的好时机，无论是帐篷、睡垫还是炉灶。如果您的夏季计划包括徒步旅行或前往偏远地区，那么从 Garmin 手表到滤水器等各种商品都可以节省费用，其中一些商品在亚马逊等零售商处也有折扣。促销活动将持续到今天 5 月 25 日结束，为了节省您滚动浏览的时间，我们在下面汇总了您仍然可以买到的最佳优惠。此外，与往年一样，REI 会员可使用代码 ANNIV26 获得一件全价商品或一件 REI Outlet 商品 20% 的折扣，为那些支付终身会员费（30 美元）的人提供更多在阵亡将士纪念日结束前节省开支的方式。特色产品 Half Dome 2 帐篷（带足迹） BioLite 现场灯 REI Siesta Hooded 20 睡袋 Black Diamond Spot 400 头灯 LifeStraw Peak 系列吸管 Coleman Cascade 经典野营炉 Exped MegaMat Duo Garmin Fenix 8 Kelty Low Loveseat --- 在本文中 --- 智能手表和健身追踪器 [产品：Garmin Fenix 8 | https://www.amazon.com/Garmin-f%25C4%2593nix%25C2%25AE-Multisport-Long-Lasting-Built/dp/B0DC6ZD321?tag=theverge02-20， https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2Ff-nix-8-51-mm-AMOLED-Slate-Gray-with-Black-Silicone-Band%2F11439909946， https://rei.pxf.io/c/482924/1448521/17195?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rei.com%2Fproduct%2F245469%2Fgarmin-fenix-8-amoled-sapphire] [产品：Amazfit Active 2 | https://www.amazon.com/Amazfit-Fitness-Tracker-Resistant-Silicone/dp/B0DT3YNMBX/?tag=theverge02-20，https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
